dc:title: Judgment and Decision Making - Complete Open-Access Corpus (2006-2022)
dc:creator: Lakens, Daniel
dc:subject: judgment
decision making
open access
natural language processing
AI validation
text mining
dc:description: A complete corpus of 855 open-access articles published in Judgment and Decision Making (2006-2022), converted to metacheck paperlist objects for validation of AI and text-mining tools. DOIs were matched via CrossRef title search and manual verification for pre-2008 papers not indexed in CrossRef.
dc:source: Judgment and Decision Making, ISSN 1930-2975, https://jbaron.org/journal/
